name: Pulse Panel FX
comment:
PULSE PANEL FX! A highly versatile and expressive fixture in the innovative Pulse line of strobe lights, the PULSE PANEL FX adds a burst of dynamism and inspiration to any show!
Designers have asked for effect lights that are more than a one-trick pony and the PULSE PANEL FX delivers with multi-functionality as a powerful strobe, bright blinder, high-output wash light or creative eye candy effect all in one.
